title: selaginella mosorongensis
intro: Selaginella mosorongensis is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Selaginella mosorongensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Selaginella mosorongensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of poultices or salves.
